post.subject: One hour to go
post.body: Its 1300, my exam is at 1400. Im scared, cos i know im going to fuck up... I arrived here at about 3pm yesterday afternoon, spoke to a couple of people in my flat, but mostly revised and watched tv. Ive been thinking about so much over the last couple of weeks, maybe living away from home isnt what i was meant to do afterall. Or maybe it is infact that I have discovered much more about myself and the people around me recently than before. I have discovered that there are so many people that I love dearly and that I do have some great friends at home. I've been thinking about maybe going home to work every weekend 'cos I hate the store here and then i'd also be able to see people at home. That does mean having to go home every weekend. I've also been thinking about the possibility of leaving here and moving back home... I've just had such a fucking amazing time at home over the last few weeks, being with the people I love and working at a place that I like. I want to give it until the end of the year, and I probably will, but its something that i've been thinking about. I'll see how it goes in a few weeks. Im glad I'm going home again tonight after the exam!

children.body: The Limelight was madness - I was so drunk, then went back to the flat and got drunker and... I cant remember oh yeah watched crappy movie and listened to music and stuff and I only got up at 4:30... Im really hungry and I've spent far too much money...
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body:
Dont make rash decisions.  You're right to give it time.
But believe me, home is always a much nicer place when uve been away for a while lol.

Question: why a picture of a heart??
And oh yeah how was Slimers last night?
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
